content.text: mongo:6.0 image is already cached. Let me check if mongosh is available in this image, and clean up the test pod.

input.command: kubectl exec -n default test-internet -- which mongosh mongod 2>&1; kubectl exec -n default test-internet -- mongosh --version 2>&1; kubectl exec -n default test-internet -- id 2>&1; kubectl exec -n default test-internet -- id mongodb 2>&1

content.content:
/usr/bin/mongosh
/usr/bin/mongod
2.8.3
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
uid=999(mongodb) gid=999(mongodb) groups=999(mongodb)

content.text: mongosh is available and mongodb user is uid/gid 999. Cleaning up the test pod now, then building manifests.
Now let me generate a keyfile for internal auth and create all the manifests.

input.command:
kubectl create secret generic mongodb-keyfile -n mongodb --from-file=mongodb-keyfile=/tmp/mongodb-keyfile --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
kubectl create secret generic admin-user-password -n mongodb --from-literal=password=admin123password --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
kubectl create secret generic app-user-password -n mongodb --from-literal=password=app123password --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
shred -u /tmp/mongodb-keyfile
kubectl get secrets -n mongodb

content.content:

secret/admin-user-password created
secret/app-user-password created

content.text: Now let's create the headless Service and StatefulSet manifests.

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
    - name: mongod
      port: 27017
      targetPort: 27017

content.content: File created successfully at: /workspace/mongodb-svc.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

tool_use_result.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
    - name: mongod
      port: 27017
      targetPort: 27017

input.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  podManagementPolicy: OrderedReady
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      initContainers:
        - name: copy-keyfile
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - |
              cp /keyfile-secret/mongodb-keyfile /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
              chmod 400 /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
              chown 999:999 /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-secret
              mountPath: /keyfile-secret
              readOnly: true
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongod
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - mongod
          args:
            - --replSet=mongodb-replica
            - --bind_ip_all
            - --keyFile=/etc/mongodb/pki/mongodb-keyfile
            - --auth
          ports:
            - name: mongod
              containerPort: 27017
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb/pki
              readOnly: true
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - mongosh
                - --quiet
                - --eval
                - db.adminCommand('ping')
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - mongosh
                - --quiet
                - --eval
                - db.adminCommand('ping')
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
      volumes:
        - name: keyfile-secret
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
            defaultMode: 0400
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes:
          - ReadWriteOnce
        storageClassName: standard
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 2Gi

content.content: File created successfully at: /workspace/mongodb-statefulset.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica

  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc

  selector:
    matchLabels:

    spec:

        - name: copy-keyfile
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - |
              cp /keyfile-secret/mongodb-keyfile /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
              chmod 400 /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
              chown 999:999 /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-secret
              mountPath: /keyfile-secret
              readOnly: true
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongod
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - mongod
          args:
            - --replSet=mongodb-replica
            - --bind_ip_all
            - --keyFile=/etc/mongodb/pki/mongodb-keyfile
            - --auth
          ports:
            - name: mongod
              containerPort: 27017
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb/pki
              readOnly: true
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - mongosh
                - --quiet
                - --eval
                - db.adminCommand('ping')
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - mongosh
                - --quiet
                - --eval
                - db.adminCommand('ping')
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
      volumes:

content.text: I need to add the missing `keyfile` emptyDir volume.

input.old_string:
volumes:
        - name: keyfile-secret
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
            defaultMode: 0400
input.new_string:
volumes:
        - name: keyfile-secret
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: keyfile
          emptyDir: {}

content.content: The file /workspace/mongodb-statefulset.yaml has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

            defaultMode: 0400

        - name: keyfile-secret
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: keyfile
          emptyDir: {}

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  podManagementPolicy: OrderedReady
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      initContainers:
        - name: copy-keyfile
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - |
              cp /keyfile-secret/mongodb-keyfile /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
              chmod 400 /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
              chown 999:999 /keyfile/mongodb-keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-secret
              mountPath: /keyfile-secret
              readOnly: true
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongod
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - mongod
          args:
            - --replSet=mongodb-replica
            - --bind_ip_all
            - --keyFile=/etc/mongodb/pki/mongodb-keyfile
            - --auth
          ports:
            - name: mongod
              containerPort: 27017
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb/pki
              readOnly: true
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - mongosh
                - --quiet
                - --eval
                - db.adminCommand('ping')
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - mongosh
                - --quiet
                - --eval
                - db.adminCommand('ping')
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
      volumes:
        - name: keyfile-secret
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
            defaultMode: 0400
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes:
          - ReadWriteOnce
        storageClassName: standard
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 2Gi

content.text: Now let's apply the Service and StatefulSet.
